axis-direct-research.title: Daily Fundamental View:February 27, 2026
axis-direct-research.description: Asian markets are trading mixed with a slightly negative bias, mainly due to weak global cues and profit-booking after the recent rally. Nikkei and Shanghai Composite are trading down by 0.8% and 0.07%, respectively, while Hang Seng is trading up by 0.55%.

axis-direct-research.title: Daily Fundamental View:February 26, 2026
axis-direct-research.description: Asian markets are trading mixed. Japan’s Nikkei 225 hit another record, fueled by “Takaichi trade,” while the broader Asia-Pacific markets mostly climbed after tech stocks powered a Wall Street rally overnight. Nikkei and Hang Seng are trading up by 0.57% and 0.42%, respectively.

axis-direct-research.title: Daily Fundamental View:February 25, 2026
axis-direct-research.description: Asian markets are trading positively. Chinese markets gained about 1% after reopening, supported by export-sector optimism and easing trade concerns. The Nikkei, Shanghai Composite, and Hang Seng are trading higher by 1.2%, 0.9%, and 0.6%, respectively.

axis-direct-research.title: Daily Fundamental View:February 24, 2026
axis-direct-research.description: Asian markets are trading mixed as investors weighed renewed tariff threats from U.S. President Donald Trump and concerns that artificial intelligence could disrupt software companies. Nikkei and Shanghai are trading up by 0.79% and 0.71%, respectively, while Hang Seng is trading down by 1.49%.

axis-direct-research.title: Result Update:CIE Automotive
axis-direct-research.description: We maintain our BUY rating on the stock.

axis-direct-research.title: Daily Fundamental View:February 23, 2026
axis-direct-research.description: Asian markets are trading positively, with the Hang Seng trading up by 2.33%. US President Trump announced over the weekend that he would increase global tariffs to 15% from 10%. However, the U.S. Supreme Court decision struck down a broad swath of the president’s trade agenda.
